description: Baremetrics is a subscription analytics service for recurring-revenue businesses. It connects to billing data sources or accepts subscription data through its API so users can analyze customers, subscriptions, revenue metrics, and related events.
summary: Baremetrics exposes one authenticated REST API at `https://api.baremetrics.com`; it accepts either a Baremetrics API key or an OAuth 2.0 access token via `Authorization: Bearer ...`.
